heading: Cross references
label: 5045 Cross references
text: For provisions relating to the establishment and operation of wineries, see subchapter F, and for penalties pertaining to wine, see subchapter J.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5045, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 611Pub. L. 85–859
